advisories.description: All version tags retroactively modified to reference malicious commit. Extracts CI/CD secrets from Runner Worker process memory, prints to workflow logs. 23,000+ repos affected.
advisories.action_to_take: BLOCK. Pin to verified commit SHA only. Update to >=46.0.0 after verifying integrity.

advisories.description: Attacker escalated privileges via automated contributor invitation process. Used to compromise tj-actions/changed-files downstream. Secrets exfiltrated from CI/CD runners.
advisories.action_to_take: BLOCK. Pin to verified commit SHA only.

advisories.description: TeamPCP hijacked 75 of 76 version tags. Encrypted exfiltration of cloud credentials to attacker C2 in real time. 10,000+ downstream workflows affected.
advisories.action_to_take: BLOCK. Pin to verified commit SHA only. Verify against Aqua Security advisory.

advisories.description: TeamPCP compromise — part of cascading trust chain attack. Compromised VS Code extensions and GitHub Actions.
advisories.action_to_take: BLOCK. Verify versions against Checkmarx security advisory before use.

notes: Compromised GitHub Actions registry. Checked by Claude Code hook before workflow file modifications. Managed via APS record #42.
